Great Balls of Fire
As performed by: Jerry Lee Lewis
Key:  C, Original C
VERSE 1:
(/G /A /B /C)
              You shake my nerves and you rattle my brain
(/C /D /E /F)
              Too much love drives a man insane
(/F /F /F#  G)                   (/G /G /F#  F7)
              You broke my will,                 but what a thrill
(C)
Goodness, gracious, great balls of fire


VERSE 2:
C
     I laughed at love, for I thought it was funny
F7
     You came along and moved me honey
G7                      F7
     I changed my mind,     this love is fine
(C)
Goodness, gracious, great balls of fire


CHORUS:
F7                 C                         F7
     Kiss me baby,    woooooo it feels good.     Hold me baby
(G7)
Well, I want to love you like a lover should
(G7) (G7) (G7)             (G7) (G7) (G7)          (G7) (G7)
               You're fine,               so kind.
(G7)                                  (G7)   (G7)    (G7)
Got to tell this world that you're mine   mine   mine     mine.


VERSE 3:
C
     I chew my nails and then I twiddle my thumbs
F7
     I'm real nervous but it sure is fun
G7               F7
     C'mon baby,    (you) drive me crazy
(C)
Goodness, gracious, great balls of fire


INSTRUMENTAL:  C    F    G  F  C    x2   C Wellllll


(CHORUS)   (VERSE 3)                END: (C) (C) (C)
